category_sources: source_facts.description says vanity address generator for Tor onion v3 hidden services; official GitHub repository describes the same purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mkp224o; official GitHub repository heading is cathugger/mkp224o.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes usage notes and project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/cathugger/mkp224o; per instruction, repo is not re-evaluated and returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README usage discusses filters and generated secret/public keys and hostnames for discovered services.
